purpose: Tighten six-hour milestone auditor sequence classification and fix stale Wave70 package manifest row counts.
audit_behavior_changes: Wrong-sequence work inside the audit window is now classified as MILESTONE_SEQUENCE_DRIFT or MILESTONE_SEQUENCE_LEDGER_GAP even if later corrected.

Audit JSON must include current_state_aligned, recent_sequence_drift_detected, drift_corrected, residual_ledger_or_manifest_gap, actionable_manifest_maintenance_needed, and target_thread_update_needed.
Stale package manifest metadata is actionable manifest maintenance when proven by parsed CSV counts.

Future six-hour audits must perform a manifest-driven technical project plan review across Plan, Instructions, Items, Tracker, active rows, deferred gates, hydration, proof logs, and evidence indexes.
forbidden_actions_preserved: No Wave71+ activation without activation-gate proof
